title: The Queen of the Damned
summary: The Queen of the Damned (1988) is a vampire novel by American writer Anne Rice, the third in her The Vampire Chronicles series. It follows Interview with the Vampire and The Vampire Lestat. This novel is a continuation of the story that ends in a cliffhanger in The Vampire Lestat and explores the rich history and mythology of the origin of the vampires, which dates back to Ancient Egypt.
extract:
The Queen of the Damned (1988) is a vampire novel by American writer  Anne Rice, the third in her The Vampire Chronicles series.  It follows Interview with the Vampire and The Vampire Lestat.  This novel is a continuation of the story that ends in a cliffhanger in The Vampire Lestat and explores the rich history and mythology of the origin of the vampires, which dates back to Ancient Egypt.
In March 2014, a new installment of Rice's series  was announced, titled Prince Lestat, which Rice's son, novelist Christopher Rice, called "a true sequel to The Queen of the Damned". A film based mostly on The Queen of the Damned was released in 2002.
